name: Bitcoin vs US Dollar
trading_hours: 24/7 - no sessions close, but volume follows traditional sessions

personality.summary: Explosive momentum instrument. Long periods of compression followed by violent expansion. Strongly respects psychological round numbers and prior swing liquidity. Weekend liquidity is thin - moves are exaggerated and often fully retraced Monday. Volume peaks during NY hours despite trading 24/7.
personality.spread_behavior: Moderate always; widens on weekends and during cascade moves
typical_moves: Ranges/compresses during Asian hours, expands London-NY
NY session (14:30-22:00 SAST) carries the most volume - real breakouts happen here
Liquidation cascades: breaks of obvious levels overshoot violently then snap back
Round numbers ($1,000 increments, especially $5k/$10k levels) act as magnets and rejection zones

key_technicals.moving_averages: D1 200 EMA defines macro regime; H4 21 EMA holds trends; M15 EMAs are noise during chop
key_technicals.liquidity: The single most liquidity-driven instrument you trade. Equal highs/lows WILL be swept. Always ask: where are the stops?
key_technicals.round_numbers: $500 and $1,000 levels react consistently; mark them every session
key_technicals.volume_profile: Prior high-volume nodes act as S/R; low-volume gaps get traversed fast
key_technicals.rsi: H4 RSI divergence at swing extremes is one of the highest-quality BTC reversal signals; M15 RSI is unreliable in expansions
key_technicals.atr: ATR regime check is mandatory: scalping compression chop is the number one BTC account killer

scalping_plan.sessions: London 09:00-12:00 SAST and especially NY 14:30-20:00 SAST. Weekends: reduce size 50% or skip.

steps: Mark obvious M15 equal highs/lows or session high/low
Wait for a wick through the level that closes back on the right side (M5)
Enter on the reclaim, SL beyond the sweep wick + 0.3x ATR
TP at the opposite liquidity pool or 1:1.5
Identify M15 range with declining ATR (at least 4 hours of compression)
Wait for M15 close outside the range WITH momentum candle (body > 70% of range height is ideal)
Enter on the M5 retest of the broken edge
SL inside the range midpoint, TP measured move (range height projected)

scalping_plan.risk: Percentage-based stops (0.4-0.8% of price for scalps), never fixed dollar amounts. Halve size when funding/volatility is extreme.

steps: H4 bias: above/below H4 21 EMA + last H4 BOS direction
Enter M15 pullback to breaker/order block after a liquidity sweep in bias direction
Partial at 1R, trail behind M15 structure, runner targets next $1,000 level or prior swing

after_hours_00_05_sast.conditions: BTC trades normally but volume is at its daily low (post-NY, pre-Asia pickup). Ranges are tighter, sweeps are common, follow-through is weak.
after_hours_00_05_sast.verdict: TRADEABLE but mean-reversion only. Do not trade breakouts in this window - they fail.
playbook: Mark the NY session high/low; fade sweeps of those levels back into range
Keep targets at 0.3-0.6% moves - expansion rarely happens here
If a large move DOES start in this window (liquidation cascade), do not fade it - stand aside, thin books exaggerate follow-through
Sunday 00:00-05:00 SAST is the thinnest liquidity of the entire week - skip

invalidations_and_traps: First breakout of a well-watched level usually sweeps and reverses - trade the reclaim, not the break
Never add to a losing position during a cascade - cascades overshoot far beyond technical levels
Weekend breakouts are suspect until confirmed by Monday NY volume
Macro events (FOMC, CPI at 14:30/20:00 SAST) move BTC like a risk asset - same news rules as forex apply
